name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0015
purpose: Create the first real MixtarRVS rootfs.squashfs file in a staged generation directory without switching /System/Current, rebuilding initramfs, changing bootloader state, or removing the Alpine/OpenRC/apk fallback.
allowed_mutations: Create rootfs.squashfs in that staged generation directory.
Create build logs and summary files.
non_goals: Do not mount the generated image as root.
Do not run apk add, apk del, or apk upgrade.
known_limitations: The image is not mounted as root.
No switch, rollback, bootloader, or garbage collection path is implemented by this stage.
The generated image may still contain compatibility substrate because the active source root is the current mutable install.
